nasb.text: being darkened in their understanding, excluded from the life of God because of the ignorance that is in them, because of the hardness of their heart;

esv.text: They are darkened in their understanding, alienated from the life of God because of the ignorance that is in them, due to their hardness of heart.

cnv.text: 他們的心思昏昧，因為自己無知，心裡剛硬，就與　神所賜的生命隔絕了。

ccb.text: 他们因为愚昧无知，顽固不化，理智受到蒙蔽，与上帝所赐的生命隔绝了。

csbs.text: 他们的意念变为黑暗，因着那在自己里面的愚昧无知和心里的刚硬，就与神的生命隔绝了；
